scripts.dev: set NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev&& npm run clean:next && next dev
scripts.build: npm run cleanup:dist-locks && npm run clean:next && next build
scripts.build:dev:portable: set "BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist\Win Dev"&& npm run cleanup:dist-locks && npm run clean:next && next build
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev" "npm run electron:wait && npm run electron"
scripts.electron:start: concurrently -k "npm run start" "npm run electron:wait && npm run electron"
scripts.preelectron:dist: set BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist\win64&& npm run cleanup:dist-locks && npm run prepare:win-fav-icon
scripts.preelectron:pack: set BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist\win64&& npm run cleanup:dist-locks && npm run prepare:win-fav-icon
scripts.preelectron:pack:dev: set "BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist\Win Dev"&& npm run cleanup:dist-locks && npm run prepare:win-fav-icon
scripts.electron:pack: npm run build && npm run prepare:win-fav-icon && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.electron-cache/tmp',{recursive:true})" && set ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache\electron&& set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.electron-cache\builder&& set TEMP=%CD%\.electron-cache\tmp&& set TMP=%CD%\.electron-cache\tmp&& set BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist\win64&& electron-builder --dir --win --x64 -c.directories.output=dist/win64 -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.electron:dist: npm run version:bump:patch && npm run build && npm run prepare:win-fav-icon && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.electron-cache/tmp',{recursive:true})" && set ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache\electron&& set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.electron-cache\builder&& set TEMP=%CD%\.electron-cache\tmp&& set TMP=%CD%\.electron-cache\tmp&& set BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist\win64&& electron-builder --win nsis --x64 -c.directories.output=dist/win64 -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.electron:dist:unblocked: npm run version:bump:patch && npm run build && npm run prepare:win-fav-icon && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.electron-cache/tmp',{recursive:true})" && set ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache\electron&& set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.electron-cache\builder&& set TEMP=%CD%\.electron-cache\tmp&& set TMP=%CD%\.electron-cache\tmp&& set BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist\win64&& electron-builder --win nsis --x64 -c.directories.output=dist/win64 -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
